name: Machar
manager_notes: Things getting more busy, but he seems to be having to sell partnership benefits both internally and with customers.
answers: Got a cold but hopefully gone in a few days.
Wants to go over a couple of ideas on how to peel back the layers internally. Referrals may not hit colleagues' numbers, so internally they may not push to go forward. We need to agree on co-working.
Lack of understanding of how partner alliance complements the sales and BD teams.
Internally, the teams that would benefit most are under the greatest strain and target pressure.
If you are a salesperson you need to meet target, so you focus on what makes money fastest.
A communication plan internally — even a presentation or a physical meeting with the teams to roll out who we are and what we do.
Track progress with current end users alongside external outreach — organic growth, maybe a shared measure across the teams.
An agreed internal rollout and one named blocker to clear would make the fortnight easier.
